title: Verify offline self-contained operation
preconditions: Fresh release installation with network denied and process, socket, dependency, and provider-adapter observation enabled.
steps: Complete account, category, pool, transaction, evidence, reconciliation, attribution, relationship, actuals, backup, restore, evolution, schema-driven orchestrator, and optional-guidance acceptance workflows; inspect processes and sockets before, during, and after.
expected: All Ledger workflows succeed without network, daemon, provider SDK, channel adapter, external database, hosted dependency, or required agent skill; no Tally process remains after invocation.
